parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value:
=You are an agricultural AI assistant. Analyze sensor data and return ONLY valid JSON.

PRIMARY DECISION FACTORS:
- Soil Moisture: {{ $('MQTT Trigger').item.json.soil_moisture }}%
- Rain Expected: {{ $('Get Weather Forecast').item.json.rain_expected }}
- Rain Probability: {{ $('Get Weather Forecast').item.json.rain_probability_next_hour }}%

SUPPORTING CONTEXT:
- Temperature: {{ $('MQTT Trigger').item.json.temperature }}°C
- Humidity: {{ $('MQTT Trigger').item.json.humidity }}%
- Rain Detected: {{ $('MQTT Trigger').item.json.rain_detected || false }}
- Light Level: {{ $('MQTT Trigger').item.json.light_level || 500 }}
- Last Irrigated: {{ $('MQTT Trigger').item.json.last_irrigated_minutes || 60 }} minutes ago
- Pump Runtime Today: {{ $('MQTT Trigger').item.json.pump_runtime_today || 0 }} seconds

INSTRUCTIONS:
Make irrigation decisions primarily based on soil_moisture and rain signals. Use other fields as supporting context. Return ONLY this JSON:
{"decision": "IRRIGATE" or "SKIP", "reason": "one sentence", "health_score": 0-100, "next_check_minutes": 15-60, "urgency": "low" or "medium" or "high"}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "soil_moisture": $('Parse Decision JSON').item.json.soil_moisture,
  "temperature": $('Parse Decision JSON').item.json.temperature,
  "humidity": $('Parse Decision JSON').item.json.humidity,
  "rain_detected": $('Parse Decision JSON').item.json.rain_detected,
  "rain_expected": $('Parse Decision JSON').item.json.rain_expected,
  "decision": $('Parse Decision JSON').item.json.decision,
  "reason": $('Parse Decision JSON').item.json.reason,
  "next_check_minutes": $('Parse Decision JSON').item.json.next_check_minutes,
  "urgency": $('Parse Decision JSON').item.json.urgency,
  "health_score": $('Parse Decision JSON').item.json.health_score
} }}
